query:
SELECT 
  ticker,
  MIN(date) as earliest_date,
  MAX(date) as latest_date,
  COUNT(*) as price_count,
  DATEDIFF(MAX(date), MIN(date)) as days_covered
FROM historical_prices
WHERE ticker IN ('AAPL.US', 'NOVN.SW', 'NESN.SW', 'ROG.SW', 'ABBN.SW')
GROUP BY ticker;

  MIN(date) as earliest_date,
  MAX(date) as latest_date,
  COUNT(*) as price_count,

FROM historical_prices
WHERE ticker IN ('AAPL.US', 'NOVN.SW', 'NESN.SW', 'ROG.SW', 'ABBN.SW')
